title: MICROBIAL ANTAGONISTS & BCA: PRACTICAL INFORMATION
subtitle: This factsheet contains complementary information to the Best4Soil video on Microbial antagonists & BCA: Practical information
description: A practical guide on using microbial antagonists and biological control agents to reduce soilborne diseases in arable and vegetable crops. It outlines preventive and curative soil management practices that boost beneficial microorganisms and reviews commercial BCA products and their application strategies.
